description: A large greenish backed empid with a typical traill's type shape. Things that point toward ALFL were the very green tones of the back and the eye-ring. The most important ID feature was the voice.Behaviors: Sitting in Russian Olives 2-5 feet up making ocassional sallies for insects.Call: pik or peekPlumage: adult
